<?php /* * This file is part of the Symfony package. * * (c) Fabien Potencier <fabien@symfony.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Symfony\Component\HttpKernel\Attribute; /** * Defines the HTTP status code applied to an exception. * * @author Dejan Angelov <angelovdejan@protonmail.com> */ #[\Attribute(\Attribute::TARGET_CLASS)] class WithHttpStatus { /** * @param int $statusCode The HTTP status code to use * @param array<string, string> $headers The HTTP headers to add to the response */ public function __construct( public readonly int $statusCode, public readonly array $headers = [], ) { } }
